title: State funeral of former Supreme Leader of Iran Khamenei begins with massive attendance and chants against the US and Israel
summary: Thousands of Iranian citizens dressed in black participate in the funeral ceremony, which includes calls for revenge and national unity.

title: United States commemorates 250 years of independence amid political divisions, extreme heat wave, and criticism from Trump
summary: The country experiences the anniversary amid a strong political debate, with a speech by Trump filled with anti-communist rhetoric and events shortened by the heat.

title: Argentina defeats Cape Verde in a thrilling match and advances to the round of 16 with an unstoppable Messi
summary: The Argentine national team struggled to overcome newcomer Cape Verde, who equalized twice before falling in extra time.

title: Six years since the devastating rains in Kyushu with tributes to the victims and remembrance of the catastrophe
summary: Residents and authorities remember those killed in the 2020 floods that devastated the region, as reconstruction continues.

title: Japan on alert for Typhoon No. 9 and heavy rains threatening landslides and floods
summary: Meteorological authorities warn of torrential rainfall in the west of the country, especially in northern Kyushu.

title: World Cup round of 16 set with all host countries qualifying and standout matchups
summary: The group stage concludes with favorites like Argentina and France advancing, and debutant Cape Verde making a strong impression.

title: Shohei Ohtani leaves early with arm discomfort after allowing three runs in six innings
summary: The Dodgers pitcher was pulled in the seventh inning as a precaution, but his team managed to come back to win.

title: Prime Minister Takaichi receives the 'Japan Jewelry Best Dresser' award for her elegance
summary: The leader was honored with a special recognition for wearing traditional Japanese jewelry at official events.

title: Putin visits operations base in Ukraine as Russia announces capture of strategic enclave in Donetsk
summary: The Russian president inspects the command center and Russian forces claim to have taken a key town, although Kyiv denies it.

title: Wave of scams in Japan: from police impersonation to dating app frauds
summary: Authorities warn about various cases of financial scams that have swindled citizens out of hundreds of millions of yen.

title: LDP calls for normalizing Diet operations while centrist party demands the prime minister's presence
summary: The ruling party urges resuming the legislative agenda, but the moderate opposition conditions its support on the appearance of the head of government.

title: Kazuma Okamoto named Rookie of the Month for June in the Central League
summary: The Giants player receives the award thanks to his seven home runs and offensive impact during the month.

title: Japan defeats Italy in the opening match of the Rugby Nations Championship
summary: The Japanese rugby team gets off to a good start in the new international tournament.

title: Japan's national figure skating camp brings together the country's best in preparation for the season
summary: Japanese skaters hold their joint pre-season training, sharing impressions on their goals and techniques.

title: X Games in Chiba award medals with Japanese triumphs in BMX and skateboarding
summary: The extreme sports competition takes place with incidents such as the restart of a heat by a photographer, but local talent shines.

title: After World Cup elimination, Nagatomo and Moriyasu reflect on the future of Japanese football
summary: The coach and the captain express their confidence that the team is on the right path to become number one in the world.

title: Controversy over harassment in a Fuji TV drama: Ai Hashimoto's agency acknowledges it, but Sato's team denies it
summary: Allegations of harassment on a program's set spark public controversy with conflicting versions.

title: First major protest against Futenma base relocation held after MV-22 Osprey accident
summary: Opponents of the relocation of the US base demand explanations for the accident that caused the death of a minor.

title: China increases its maritime presence near Taiwan and criticizes security cooperation between Japan and India
summary: China's actions at sea and its statements against the security alliance with India raise regional tension.

title: US and Israel coordinate UN meeting while NATO reaffirms collective defense commitment
summary: Both countries seek to align positions ahead of the General Assembly, while the Atlantic Alliance underscores its unity in the face of internal fractures.
